entities.old_man: an old man with white hair in a brown cardigan
entities.old_woman: an old woman with white curly hair in a lilac coat

scenes.title: The Park Bench
scenes.background_prompt: A park with a long green wooden bench under a large maple tree, a gravel path with fallen leaves, flower beds with roses in bloom, and a stone fountain visible in the distance. Autumn afternoon. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An autumn afternoon in a park. A long green wooden bench sits under a large maple tree whose leaves are turning orange and gold. An old man with white hair in a brown cardigan sits on the left side of the bench, reading a thick book with reading glasses perched on his nose. The right side of the bench is empty. A folded lilac coat and a small wicker basket sit neatly on the right side of the bench seat, as if the person who placed them there stepped away briefly and will return. Fallen maple leaves in red and orange are scattered on the gravel path in front of the bench. Rose bushes in deep red bloom in the flower bed behind, and a stone fountain is faintly visible in the distance.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place old_man on the left side of the bench, sitting and reading a thick book with reading glasses on. Leave the right side of the bench empty — the old_woman (ghost entity) would appear here, seated beside him as usual, as if she has just stepped away.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom-left foreground, a patch of green grass is dotted with small white and pink flowers and green clovers. Moving right across the foreground, a light brown gravel path is scattered with several small, orange and brown fallen leaves. On the far right of the foreground, a large green bush is filled with blooming roses in shades of pink, yellow, and red. Just behind the grass on the left, a circular flowerbed bordered by a low grey stone wall contains several pink and yellow roses. To the right of this flowerbed, a three-tiered grey stone fountain sits in the middle ground, with light blue water spraying from the top tier into the basins below. Further to the right, an old_man with white hair, a white beard, and round glasses sits on a long green wooden bench with curved armrests. He is wearing a brown jacket over a yellow shirt, light blue pinstriped trousers, and brown shoes. He is hunched slightly forward, holding an open brown book in both hands and reading it. The bench is positioned directly beneath a large, thick-trunked tree with a wide canopy of leaves in vibrant autumn colors including red, orange, yellow, and green. Behind the old_man and the bench, another flowerbed filled with pink, yellow, and red roses lines the edge of the path. In the background, the scene opens up to a park setting under a pale blue sky filled with soft, white, rounded clouds. To the left, several rounded trees in shades of green and yellow stand against the horizon. To the right, rolling green hills are dotted with more distant trees under the soft light of a clear day. The entire scene is rendered in a clean, cartoon-style illustration with bold outlines.
